Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Deft'S Answer
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CRAIG TRIANCE, TEL. NO. (714) 664-0594 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT DAVID COLEMAN BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE FOR WAMU 2002-AR15'S Motion To Strike Portions Of The Defendant David Coleman's Answer by Plaintiff is denied. Atty. Triance is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/pjb
